items.title: Conversational link and memory-only Socratic seed
evidence: PR #9 final reviewed head a62ce6d30723ce7f6a0d4aeab7a46615cf41db41; package implementation head 3c1b64a49eb25f09c0a8da448f5bfb355394d88a
implementer evidence: npm test passed 18 of 18 on Linux x64 / Node v22.16.0
implementer evidence: npm pack produced workframe-0.2.1.tgz and a clean temporary install returned version 0.2.1 with valid status JSON
implementer evidence: a real PTY synthetic verification returned stopped:interrupt after Ctrl+C and emitted no Socratic prompt
reviewer targeted reproduction against the exact dialogue parser: negative or descriptive candidate mentions can select an unintended path
PR #9 exact-head CI runs 29356707079 and 29358102705 failed at Harness verify; package-install and negative-install steps were skipped
no live provider call, package publication, installation mutation, or non-CLI code change
acceptance: select one existing inference path conversationally without guessing ambiguity
represent account-backed and API-key-backed paths separately and disclose exact payer, credential source, and invocation before consent
require separate explicit consent before one minimal cancellable verification call
remove Docker, SSH, unrelated credentials, and other ambient authority handles from inference children
after a verified path, collect preferred name and first objective
print a bounded memory-only mirror without filesystem or installation mutation
package-local, real-PTY, Windows-semantics, exact-head CI, and packed-artifact checks pass without live credentials

failures: invalid OpenRouter JSON.stringify syntax
questioning or qualified language could authorize a provider call
credential transmission wording was inaccurate
authority-boundary tests did not exercise the complete flow
EOF and interruption were not handled deterministically
credential-bearing subprocess diagnostics could escape
prompt echo and refusal text could falsely verify providers
best/default questions could select a candidate
repository CI remained red
verification was not cancellable after consent
hedged runtime selections were accepted
account and API-key billing paths were conflated
inference children inherited Docker and SSH authority handles
the implementation branch was behind and diverged from main
no package or repository CI run was attached to the exact reviewed head
descriptive and negative-context candidate mentions can authorize a path
multi-clause exclusions can silently select an unrelated remaining candidate
Windows production taskkill completion and child-tree termination are not observed
exact-head CI is red and does not independently execute the package-local and packed-tarball matrix

verified_repairs: the implementation branch was rebuilt from then-current main and was mergeable at review
verification cancellation reaches terminal, HTTP, and asynchronous child-process interfaces
account-backed and API-key-backed candidates are distinct
inference child environments exclude Docker, SSH, unrelated credentials, and arbitrary ambient variables
structured provider parsers require the exact WORKFRAME_OK assistant response
failures: candidate selection still treats any unhedged candidate mention as an affirmative choice, including descriptive and negative-context statements
exclusion parsing can exclude multiple named paths and silently choose an unrelated remaining candidate
Windows cancellation can report cancelled without observing taskkill completion or proving the runtime child tree exited
exact-head CI runs fail at Harness verify and skip downstream package evidence
repository CI does not independently execute the package-local and packed-tarball matrix
required_remediation: require affirmative candidate-selection syntax or parse explicit positive and negative clauses so mere mentions cannot select a path
scope exclusions to the candidate clause they modify and never infer an unrelated remaining candidate from ambiguous multi-clause text
add regressions for every exact failing phrase in the fourth review
await and verify Windows taskkill completion, handle spawn and nonzero-exit failures, and do not settle cancellation while the child tree may remain alive
add a Windows test exercising the production .cmd and taskkill path
attach package-local and packed-tarball checks to exact-head CI and obtain a green or explicitly isolated repository result before resubmission
next_builder_slice: fix affirmative candidate selection and clause-scoped exclusion parsing
make Windows production cancellation fail closed
add only the focused regressions and exact-head package evidence needed for those defects

items.title: Truthful runtime and provider capability graph
Explicit apply and rollback authority gates

invariants: Do not modify packages/create-workframe, apps, services, infra, or existing runtime behavior.
Do not read, print, persist, or transmit credential values except directly to the explicitly selected provider after consent.
Do not overwrite, adopt, or mutate an existing setup without explicit approval of a concrete immutable plan.
Do not use a Workframe-hosted or implicit cloud fallback.
Publication remains a separate reviewed release decision.
